label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classifies the strategic positioning or approach described in the study

label: Viability Prediction
definition: A forward-looking prediction about a technology or entity made at study time

label: Actual Outcome
definition: What actually happened after the study; based on post-hoc research

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a specific technology's features or capabilities

label: Benchmark Result
definition: A quantitative performance measurement or benchmark

label: Framework Factor
definition: A structural or environmental factor identified within an analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative market share or position data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst or expert qualitative judgment or recommendation

label: High Confidence
definition: Finding is well-supported by explicit text or authoritative post-hoc sources

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Finding is plausible but based on inference or partial evidence

label: Low Confidence
definition: Finding is speculative or based on limited evidence

label: Expert Assessment
definition: Aberdeen analyst assessment based on product review and industry knowledge

label: Vendor Claim
definition: Claim made by IBM or Lotus in product documentation or briefings

label: Historical Record
definition: Post-hoc fact established from authoritative secondary sources

label: Expert Forecast
definition: Forward-looking prediction made by Aberdeen analysts

label: Vendor Analysis
definition: Structured analysis of vendor product strategy

label: Analyst Opinion
definition: Direct qualitative recommendation by Aberdeen analyst
